reconstructed_sketch: From the chapter thesis alone (Ch. 2 weaves sāṅkhya / karma yoga / sthita-prajña, with karma yoga proper running 2.31-2.53), an engineering analog at the 2.47 position would be expected to address shipping discipline / action under uncertainty / non-grasping at outcomes. A competent writer could land on 'do the work without obsessing over outcome' and reach for 'merge the PR despite outcome anxiety' as the scenario — the chapter-thesis hard-edge 'Action without attachment ≠ inaction (2.47-2.51). The verse explicitly rejects inaction. Engineering layers must not be readable as stop caring about outcomes' would even hint at the inaction-rejection clause. So the OUTLINE is partially reconstructible.
verse_specific_signal: The TWO-DIRECTION structure — paralysis-at-git-push AND comfortable-rewrite-of-an-internal-CLI-as-displacement — both being instances of the same verse, with the rewrite-as-displacement being named explicitly and the falsifiability clause forbidding the 'stop reading dashboards' reading. A chapter-thesis-only reconstruction would capture the paralysis-at-shipping direction; it is unlikely to spontaneously generate the inverse-failure (comfort-rewrite) direction with this specificity, because that requires the saṅgaḥ akarmaṇi clause that 2.47 specifically contains.

overlap_with_other_verses.explanation: BG 2.48 is the immediate doctrinal gloss of 2.47 (samatvaṁ yoga ucyate) and will plausibly share outcome-detachment / shipping-discipline tags; the doctrine-coherence reviewer will need to verify these tag uses do not drift.

verdict_reason: INSUFFICIENT_CONTEXT — the rendered prompt did not include chapter_context (the engineering layers of the other Ch. 2 verses). Per the gate's own calibration rule, when chapter_context is empty respond with PASS and INSUFFICIENT_CONTEXT. I have provided a best-effort sketch using the chapter thesis alone, which is permitted as input. From that thesis-only baseline, the verse's engineering layer is roughly 30% reconstructible (the chapter-level drift toward 'action without attachment' is predicted; the specific software-engineering anchors — outcome-anxiety paralysis at git push AND comfort-rewrite-as-displacement — are NOT predictable from thesis alone). Score 3 reflects this: the verse adds genuine per-verse signal beyond chapter-level paraphrase. Authoritative re-run required at chapter-completion time.
